creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text: The bootstrap at http://distcache.freebsd.org/local-distfiles/glewis/bootstrap-openjdk11/bootstrap-openjdk11-powerpc64-11.0.5.tar.xz may also be necessary to compile openjdk11 on POWER8+.  Note that URL is certainly temporary.  Once I've got some confirmation that we have a working set up I'll get the port ready to go.
